title: Pekt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:PektGB.jpg]] |name=Pekt |homeworld=[[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' DataBank, Pekt entry |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Avatar Orbital Platform]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' |species=[[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Pekt's clan]] *[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'll skin them alive!|Pekt|audio=Pektskinalive.flac|}} '''Pekt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] from [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]] who was born into a powerful family, and became a [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he joined with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Hindane Darcc]] to enslave the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He and Darcc were subsequently [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|chased]] off Kashyyyk by a Wookiee [[Army/Legends|army]] led by the Wookiee [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Pekt was then killed in the raid on [[Avatar Orbital Platform]]. ==Biography== ===Early career=== {{Quote|This is but a minor sssssetback. We will ssssssee you again. The price of Wookiee pelts isn't getting any lower.|Pekt during his escape from the Trade Federation fortress on Alaris Prime|audio=PektEscape.flac|}} The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] Pekt was born on the [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]]. He was a member of a powerful [[Pekt's clan|clan]], and at a young age, began to expand his clan's empire. As a young hatchling, he used his servants in experiments with [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] restraints. After reaching the molt stage, Pekt moved on to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] prisoners-of-war kept in his clan's [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] and soon gained a reputation for his sadism. Realizing that the Wookiees had great strength, Pekt used his [[Pekt's father|father's]] fortune to research their biology, and developed a series of techniques to capture and enslave them. He earned a certain degree of fame when he was consulted by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] in order to make some custom weapons for him, and in return, Pekt received a number of fine Wookiee pelts, which he gifted to his egg-litter. On one job, a [[Unidentified Wookiee (Pekt)|Wookiee]] broke free, seized Pekt in his paws, and tore off the Trandoshan's [[Limb/Legends|arms]] while Pekt just stared at him. The Wookiee was then [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Pekt returned to Trandosha. Within a [[Standard month/Legends|month]], his arms had regenerated, a trait shared by all Trandoshans, and he was back at the camp. [[File:Pekt_ships.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Pekt escaped the destruction of the Trade Federation fortress on Alaris Prime.]] Sometime between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] for [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] —which Pekt participated in as described in as portrayed in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''—between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]. Pekt was an ally of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during their [[Alaris Prime colonization resolution|illegal]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonization]] of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Alaris/Legends|Alaris]] in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]]. When the rightful Wookiee [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] first landed there they encountered and destroyed a Trade Federation [[Power core/Legends|power core]], which had been previously damaged by [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]] living on the moon. A [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] named [[OOL-2]] found the remains of the power core and identified the gundarks as the perpetrators to [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], who ordered the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to exterminate the gundarks, skin them, and bring their pelts to the Trandoshans. The Wookiees and the Trade Federation encountered each other when they both [[Skirmish at the gundark nest|attacked]] the [[Unidentified gundark nest|gundark nest]]. The Trade Federation attacked the Wookiees, leading to several [[Alaris Prime colonial war|conflicts]] on the moon which saw the destruction of several Trade Federation installations before the Wookiee leader [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] planned a final attack on their last [[Unidentified Trade Federation base|base]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] arrived to participate in the [[Battle for Alaris Prime]], sighting several of Pekt's [[Neimoidian transport|transport ships]] and correctly deducing that they belonged to Trandoshan slavers. The Wookiee objective in the battle was to destroy the Trade Federation [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]], which they achieved using [[Energy pummel/Legends|energy pummels]].[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] Jinn alerted the Wookiees that two of Pekt's [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] flew from the wreckage, inside one of them the Trandoshan claimed the Wookiee victory was only a minor setback and that he would return as Wookiee pelts were still valuable. ===Enslavement of the Wookiees=== {{Quote|No sign of Darcc. I'll wager that's him and Pekt in that transport.|Solo, upon sighting Darcc's shuttle leaving the planet|audio=NoSignOfDarcc.flac|}} [[File:DarccPektEscape1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Darcc and Pekt escape Kashyyyk with a cargo hold full of Wookiees.]] Gradually, Pekt's reputation as a Wookiee-exterminator garnered him several jobs around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], working for bounty hunters, gangsters, and eventually the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He hired a task force of ex-[[Trandoshan Army]] regulars and it was rumored that he could clear a Wookiee village in less than a [[Standard week/Legends|standard week]]. When the Empire took control of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], under advisement from Trandosha, they enslaved the major [[City/Legends|cities]] of the planet. Pekt and the Trandoshan [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] were selected by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Hindane Darcc]] to oversee the entire slaving operation, and Pekt drew up the plans for the [[Avatar Orbital Platform]], a slaving hub in Kashyyyk's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Pekt knew as long as the Empire controlled Kashyyyk, he could act with impunity, and he did—stepping up both his experiments and his slaving trade. However, in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the enslaved Wookiees, [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|freed and gathered]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] members [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], attacked Pekt and Darcc's holdings. After the Wookiee [[Army/Legends|army]] destroyed [[Darcc's Palace]], Pekt and the Moff escaped in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], with a hold full of Wookiee slaves, to the heavily protected Avatar Orbital Platform. There they stood in the station's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]]. The Wookiee army followed them to Avatar and knocked out the station's [[Airbase/Legends|airbase]]s, preventing their escape. With the arrival of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], their fortress was demolished. Solo and Pekt traded insults, and Pekt and Darcc were soon [[Death/Legends|killed]], one of the most important supportive acts for the [[Kashyyyk resistance/Legends|Kashyyyk Resistance]].''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' The orbital station was destroyed soon afterwards. ==Personality and traits== [[File:PektSprite-SWGB.png|thumb|Pekt]] {{Quote|Man, you Trandoshans are ugly up close.''"
"''The sentiment is mutual, human.|Han Solo and Pekt trading insults on Avatar Orbital Station|}} At an early age, Pekt experimented with slavery restraints. When a Wookiee was trying to tear his arms off, he just stared back coldly. Pekt, like Trandoshans in general, was not considered to be honest or brave. At the time of his death, he had a reputation for brutality and was considered to be especially sadistic. Pekt also considered [[Human/Legends|Humans]] to be ugly. ==Behind the scenes== Pekt was voiced by [[Frank Welker]] in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. He received his first [[canon]]ical mention in the game's [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]], and went on to appear in the game's Chewbacca campaign. He and Darcc escape in a scripted event at the end of the fifth mission. In the sixth mission, taking place on Avatar, the player's objective is to kill Pekt and Darcc. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Pekt|imagecat=Images of Pekt}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' *{{InsiderCite|124|Blood Feud!|reprint=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Pekt |es=Pekt |nl=Pekt |pt=Pekt }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Trandoshans]]
